title: Workflow — safe field type migration from string amount to double
migration_snippet:
# Goal: migrate orders.amount from string ('99.50') to double (99.5)
# Current: 8M documents, all have amount as string
# Application parses string to float on every read
# Target: amount_v2 as double, validated by schema validator
expected_feedback: Workflow: field type migration requires new-field pattern. (1) Add amount_v2 field via _id-range batched update with aggregation pipeline: [{$set: {amount_v2: {$toDouble: '$amount'}}}]. (2) Deploy app with dual-read (prefer amount_v2, fallback to amount). (3) Deploy app writing amount_v2 on all new orders. (4) Add validator with validationLevel 'moderate' requiring amount_v2. (5) Verify all docs have amount_v2: db.orders.countDocuments({amount_v2: {$exists: false}}). (6) Switch validator to 'strict'. (7) Separate release: batch $unset of old amount field.
